comment: v0.1: non-interactive discovery/config tests only; informational (continue-on-error). oidcc-server checks server metadata fields; oidcc-discovery-issuer-not-matching-config checks issuer consistency — both are metadata-only, no /authorize interaction required. Interactive flow tests (codereuse, redirect-uri, scope, userinfo, etc.) are added at v0.3 when /authorize lands. Plan confirmed present in OIDF suite release-v5.1.42 (oidcc-config-certification-test-plan not chosen: prefer confirmed IDs over unverified plan names per brief). OidcConformanceIT derives module list at runtime from the OIDF suite API; this file is metadata only — it is not loaded by any Java code.
